info.name: MoSPI eSankhyiki EC
info.description:
Client for the Government of India MoSPI 'eSankhyiki' Economic Census API (spec title: 'EC 4-6 APIs' v1.0).

Base URL is {{baseUrl}} = https://esankhyiki.mospi.gov.in/EC

Auth model: the API defines NO security scheme. The token is a PLAIN CUSTOM HEADER named 'AuthToken' — not OAuth, not Bearer. Collection auth is therefore 'No Auth'; the token rides in the header on the query* requests.

Token lifecycle: TokenGenerate returns a token valid for ~10 MINUTES. The TokenGenerate request has a post-response script that auto-saves it into {{authToken}}, so re-minting is one click.

CASING QUIRK (intentional, from the published spec): UserRegister uses lowercase "password"; TokenGenerate uses "passWord" (capital W). Both reference the same {{password}} env var. Do not normalise the JSON keys.

NOTE: request filters are STATE-level only. district_code appears in the RESPONSE rows — query by state, aggregate district-side afterwards.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "<< your name >>",
  "emailId": "{{emailId}}",
  "organization": "<< your organization >>",
  "purpose": "<< your purpose >>",
  "password": "{{password}}"
}

request.description: One-time account registration. Fill name/organization/purpose in the body, set {{emailId}} and {{password}} in the environment, then Send. All five fields are required. Note the lowercase "password" key here.

exec: // Auto-save AuthToken from TokenGenerate. Token is valid ~10 minutes.
// Exact response key is NOT confirmed against the live API — try common variants.
token = res.Token || res.token || res.AuthToken || res.authToken || (res.data && (res.data.Token || res.data.token));
console.warn('No token field found. Inspect the raw response and adjust this script:', pm.response.text());

request.description: Mint a ~10-minute token. Note the capital-W "passWord" key (differs from UserRegister). The post-response script writes the returned token into {{authToken}}. If the console warns that no token was found, open the raw response and adjust the key list in the script.

Query Economic Census EC6 data. Required body fields: state, pageNum. Optional filters (add as needed): activity, nop, sof, ownership, sector. Returns 20 rows/page; rows include district_code. Example state=27 (Maharashtra). Requires the AuthToken header (auto-filled from {{authToken}}).
Query Economic Census EC5 data. Same body/filters as queryEC6. Optional filters: activity, nop, sof, ownership, sector.
Query Economic Census EC4 data. Same body/filters as queryEC6. Optional filters: activity, nop, sof, ownership, sector.
